# awsext_qconnect_ai_agent (Resource)

Creates and manages an Amazon Q in Connect AI Agent (`qconnect:CreateAIAgent`). Fields other than `configuration`, `visibility_status`, and `tags` force replacement when changed.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "awsext_qconnect_ai_agent" "customer_agent" {
  assistant_id      = awsext_qconnect_assistant.example.assistant_id
  name              = "customer-agent"
  type              = "ANSWER_RECOMMENDATION"
  visibility_status = "PUBLISHED"
  configuration = jsonencode({
    answerGenerationAIPromptId = awsext_qconnect_ai_prompt.example.ai_prompt_id
    locale                     = "en_US"
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `assistant_id` (String) Identifier of the parent Amazon Q in Connect assistant.
- `configuration` (String) JSON string containing the AIAgentConfiguration payload for the chosen `type`. The shape of the JSON varies by agent type; see the [AWS Q in Connect API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazon-q-connect/latest/APIReference/) for the fields applicable to each type. Use `jsonencode({...})` in Terraform to avoid whitespace drift.
- `name` (String) Name of the AI Agent.
- `type` (String) Type of the AI Agent. One of ANSWER_RECOMMENDATION, MANUAL_SEARCH, SELF_SERVICE, EMAIL_OVERVIEW, EMAIL_RESPONSE, EMAIL_GENERATIVE_ANSWER, NOTE_TAKING, ORCHESTRATION, CASE_SUMMARIZATION.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the AI Agent.
- `tags` (Map of String) Tags to assign to the AI Agent.
- `visibility_status` (String) Visibility status of the AI Agent. One of PUBLISHED or SAVED. Defaults to SAVED when omitted.

### Read-Only

- `ai_agent_arn` (String) ARN of the AI Agent.
- `ai_agent_id` (String) Service-assigned UUID of the AI Agent.
